历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2607 → 3004 → 2949 → 3026 → 2209. In 2025, the ranking significantly advanced to 2209, an improvement of about 817 places compared to 2024, marking the best level in the past five years, reflecting a notable increase in the university's appeal among Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 88 → 87 → 86 → 86 → 67, with a reduction of 19 in 2025 compared to 2024. In 2026, the plan is 61, a further decrease of 6 from 2025 (a reduction of about 9%), with continued contraction intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 11th, with a continuous upward trend in recent years (from 15th in 2021 to 11th in 2026), firmly among the top engineering institutions in the country. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly due to the Yang Yun incident involving moral misconduct and academic fraud, which may slightly suppress the application psychology of some candidates. On Douyin, it is relatively hot (overall ranking 56th), with the 'National Defense Seven Sons' label continuing to attract attention. It has 16 A- or above disciplines, including 7 A+ disciplines: Instrument Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Aerospace Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, and Software Engineering. Its disciplinary strength is extremely prominent, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Beihang's advantageous major categories such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Artificial Intelligence continue to be highly recommended with sustained social popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jiangsu general college entrance examination is 521,000, a significant increase from the approximately 260,000 Physics Category candidates in 2025. Based on the recent proportion of Physics Category candidates at about 70%, it is estimated that there will be about 360,000 to 370,000 Physics Category candidates in 2026, with a substantially expanded competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong performance of the significant ranking advancement in 2025, the continued enrollment reduction in 2026, the expansion of the provincial candidate pool, and the university's top disciplinary strength, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will further advance based on the 2025 baseline, but with a narrowed margin. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2120, with a range of 1866 to 2374.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1866–2374, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 1866), you can primarily target Tier 1 majors such as Computer Top Talent Program and Future Aerospace Leading Program. If your ranking is near the upper bound of the range (around 2374), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3 majors like Aerospace and Aviation and Science Experimental Class, while also considering Tier 2 Information majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1026 → 867 → 959 → 923 → 958, with a fluctuation range of 867–1026 in the past 5 years, overall stable in the 900–1000 range, with a baseline ranking of 958 in 2025; the planned enrollment numbers for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 6 → 7 → 6 → 6 → 5 respectively, with a planned enrollment of 5 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, indicating a very small and stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 11th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, a top-tier national university; the 2026 reputation evaluation is significantly negative (Yang Yun incident), which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity is relatively high, but as a science and engineering university, Beihang's History Category enrollment majors are single (only Social Science Experimental Class), so the reputation impact is limited; Foreign Language and Literature is rated A, which has some relevance to majors such as Law, Economics, and Administrative Management within the Social Science Experimental Class; overall academic strength is strong, but the History Category enrollment majors have low relevance to the university's core engineering strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has high social popularity (recommended), Economics/Finance categories are divided and wait-and-see; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangsu Province general college entrance examination is 521,000, with History Category candidates estimated at about 27–30% in recent years, approximately 140,000–156,000, a significant increase from 97,000 in 2025, expanding the competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the long-term stability of History Category rankings, unchanged enrollment plan, significant increase in the number of candidates across the province, and slightly negative university reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 973, with a range of 856–1090.
